//: Foundation-kit hook wiring. Copy to .claude/settings.json and adjust matchers/paths. $CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR resolves to the repo root at hook time, so this file is portable across machines. The autoformat hook below assumes a Python/ruff project — swap the command for prettier/eslint/gofmt as appropriate.

hooks.command: file="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; case "$file" in *.env|*credentials*.json|*token.json|*.pem|*.key|*secret*) echo 'BLOCKED: refusing to edit a secrets/credential file' >&2; exit 2;; esac

hooks.//: Block a push or PR-create if the branch diff leaks a secret into a normal source file. The scanner exits 2 on a finding, which blocks the tool call.
hooks.command: cmd=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty' 2>/dev/null); if printf '%s' "$cmd" | grep -Eq 'git[[:space:]]+push|gh[[:space:]]+pr[[:space:]]+create'; then bash "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.claude/hooks/secret-scan-diff.sh"; fi
file="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; [[ "$file" == *.py ]] && ruff check --fix --quiet "$file" 2>/dev/null && ruff format --quiet "$file" 2>/dev/null; true
